3279760.name: The Time Forgotten
3279760.description:
The Time Forgotten drops players into the heart of a stunningly realized, immersive world. Every dinosaur for itself. In this world there can only be one left standing; search for Evolution Points through exploration, combat, and major choices on your dinosaur. Shape your dinosaur's journey of evolution. Develop special abilities and traits that give you an edge over the foe in the match and earn your rightful place as KING.

  • Creation

First things first. You get to design your dream selected dinosaur (You customize each dinosaur in the game to your liking) You'll be able to choose the starting traits and what your dinosaur will look and be, but that's the very beginning. New skins, color schemes, and other fun cosmetics will be unlocked the further you level up your dinosaur. You develop your dinosaur's strengths and weaknesses through the use of a large array of different evolution paths in the evolution menu. From armored plates to swifter movement to heightened senses.

  • Evolution

Survival requires evolution. You stride through the map, finding Evolution Spires scattered throughout the island. Small ones hidden inside caves, Massive towering spires standing sky-high in the landscape. With each evolution, you're going to be preparing your dinosaur for the opponents you'll face in combat in a grueling game of several fights to the death.

  • Exploration

The island is your hunting ground. An evolving world with multiple biomes and hazards. Trek through the sakura forests, or across desolate plains. Frozen peaks and badlands, Dense Pine Forests and Crimson Fields, Climb the towering mountains over the island. Beneath it all, a network of underground caves: bioluminescent caverns lighting up with that ethereal glow; volcanic tubes whirling with that burning, fiery lava; and slippery, noisy ice caves where the frost just shatters off the walls. Every biome has its terrors and possibilities. And through it all, the island lives: storms rage on, the sun sets, and the merciless Firestorm drives survivors closer together, as the circle closes in with the match's exhilarating conclusion where one player wins it all.

  • Progression

Every single fight is another milestone in the history of your dinosaur. Survive long enough to gain XP and level up, and new cosmetic options open up for letting you be unique. Select new traits like running speed increases or stamina increases and work your style of play. Prestige your dinosaur at the maxed level to reset abilities for exclusive rewards: rare skins and colors mark you as a veteran survivor. However, When the prestige level is bigger... failing in much higher stakes will set back experience. Always give the best in every match.

  • The Loop

Adapt or perish. No two games will ever be the same in The Time Forgotten, Every time you start a match, The layout of the caves is different, blocking off-and sometimes opening-areas you might not have been able to access before. Moreover, with heavy weather and natural catastrophes, the island gets reshaped, and places that could be reached earlier become unreachable, while previously secret resources appear. Any plans you had from your last match will probably not work in the next. Surviving isn't solely fighting, It is tactical warfare in mastering the island itself, reading dangers, making split decisions that sometimes turn to one's advantage.

  • A Dinosaur Battle Royale

The Time Forgotten is an extreme test of Primal survival. Choose your dinosaur from one of three classes, each one of which corresponds to a different kind of combat style. There's Apex, With abilities to deal as much damage as possible, Bruisers, with abilities to increase defenses and punish mistakes, And Devious, With abilities to avoid attacks and cause as many negative effects causing death. Each class will be balanced through another in a rock-paper-scissors like way, so that each and every encounter will be tense due to the clashes in strengths versus vulnerabilities. Choose your class, sharpen your abilities, and then let your instincts run wild to become the Apex predator in this island.
3279760.supported_languages:
英语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 德语, 法语, 意大利语, 日语, 韩语, 俄语, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 瑞典语
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
